title: Life on Mount Hamilton,1899-1913: oral history transcript, 1968
creator: Campbell, Kenneth, 1899-

description: Interview conducted Jan. 11, 1968 by Elizabeth S. Calciano for Regional History Project, University of California, Santa Cruz. With comments by C. Donald Shane. Copies of photographs inserted. Recollections of his father, W.W. Campbell, the director of Lick Observatory, and other astronomers; life on Mt. Hamilton during his boyhood
Included in: History of Science and Technology Collection
